node.text:
Introducing the AIRMAX 95000. 

Featuring a forefoot Air bag and heel ‘Big Bubble’ Air, the new design also arrives with another Nike product first: Project Nectar technology. This new, Nike-only printing method provides durability, traction and embellishment on the innovative 3D-printed upper, which is crafted in partnership with @zellerfeld. 

Welcome to the future.

YEAR 1 IN THE BOOKS.

teamed up with @supplystore for a massive weekend down under
@surplussydney

📷 @skatetochurch

node.text:
Test 01 Agility - Training Tape ft. Nirka.

KNWLS Nike. @knwlslondon

Maximal athleticism. Elegance personified. The KNWLS Nike collection.

Launching on KNWLS 10.14 and on SNKRS and select retailers 10.23

Historically black colleges and universities don’t simply just create graduates; they create a legacy that impacts the world as we know it. These Yardrunners are standard setters, who embody their school’s legacy while actively pushing it forward.

The Yardrunners Air Max 95 collection is available on SNKRS in select regions on 10.14.

node.text:
For fine days spent on the river.

The Nike x @nigo x @levis Air Force 3 drops October 16 on SNKRS.

VIRGIL ABLOH: THE CODES — a look inside the vision of a generation-defining creator.

Showcasing pieces from the archives of Virgil Abloh and Nike at the Grand Palais, September 30 - October 9, 2025. The exhibition celebrated Virgil’s relentless creativity and boundless influence.

It’s an honor to continue his legacy with Shannon Abloh and V.A.A.

Forever inspired. Long live Virgil 🤍

Dernier appel pour les passagers du vol RK61 ! À l’instar de Daba Traoré, ancienne hôtesse de la compagnie aérienne Air Afrique, embarquez pour la sortie mondiale de la Air Max RK61, disponible sur SNKRS demain à 9h.

Final call for passengers on flight RK61!
Just like Daba Traoré, former flight attendant for the legendary Air Afrique airline, get ready to board the global release of the Air Max RK61, landing tomorrow on SNKRS.
